description: MCP server for JSON processing — format, validate, diff, convert (YAML/CSV/XML/TOML/TS), minify, query, analyze

tools.name: validate_json
tools.description: Validate JSON and return structure analysis

tools.name: convert_json
tools.description: Convert JSON to YAML, CSV, XML, TOML, or TypeScript interface

tools.name: analyze_json
tools.description: Analyze JSON structure, depth, key count, and types
